## Linked Issue (required)
- [ ] This PR links an approved issue using `Closes #<id>` or `Refs #<id>`.
- Issue URL/ID:

## Governance Gates (required before opening PR)
- [ ] The linked issue was created from an issue template (not blank issue).
- [ ] The linked issue has `status:approved`.
- [ ] Exactly one `type:*` label is present on this PR.

## Validation
- [ ] Relevant tests were added/updated.
- [ ] Relevant checks were run locally.
